title: Prim
description: Prim is a modpack for people who hate playing modpacks. Carefully curated to be as close as possible to the vanilla experience, expanding existing systems and following Mojang's design principles as much as possible.
body: Prim is a modpack for people who hate modpacks. With a close attention to detail and careful curation to mirror Mojang's design, you'll wish Vanilla felt like this. > Prim is in early Alpha. Mods can and will be removed or changes between releases, so I wouldn't recommend starting any long-term worlds right now. --- If there are issues you'd like to report, just send me an ask on my Tumblr. I'm testing this modpack on a Mac, so if there's a Windows-specific bug you're experiencing, it might take me a while to fix it.
